name: Bulbasaur
description: There is a plant seed on its back right from the day this Pokémon is born. The seed slowly grows larger.

name: Ivysaur
description: When the bulb on its back grows large, it appears to lose the ability to stand on its hind legs.

name: Venusaur
description: The plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight.

name: Charmander
description: The flame on its tail shows the strength of its life force. A weakening flame shows that it is in poor health.

name: Charmeleon
description: It has a barbaric nature. In battle, it whips its fiery tail around and slashes away with sharp claws.

name: Charizard
description: It spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. It may cause forest fires by blowing flames.

name: Squirtle
description: When it retracts its long neck into its shell, it squirts out water with vigorous force.

name: Wartortle
description: It is recognized as a symbol of longevity. If its shell has algae on it, that Wartortle is very old.

name: Blastoise
description: It crushes its foe under its heavy body to cause fainting. In a pinch, it will withdraw inside its shell.

name: Pidgey
description: A common sight in forests and woods. It flaps its wings at ground level to kick up blinding sand.

name: Pidgeotto
description: Very protective of its sprawling territorial area, this Pokémon will fiercely peck any intruders.

name: Pidgeot
description: This Pokémon flies at Mach 2 speed, seeking prey. Its large talons are feared as weapons.

name: Oddish
description: During the day, it keeps its face buried in the ground. At night, it wanders around sowing its seeds.

name: Gloom
description: The fluid that oozes from its mouth isn't drool. It is a nectar that is used to attract prey.

name: Vileplume
description: It has the world's largest petals. With every step, the petals shake out heavy clouds of toxic pollen.

name: Bellossom
description: When Bellossom get exposed to plenty of sunlight, the leaves ringing its body begin to spin and it dances.

name: Paras
description: Burrows to suck tree roots dry. The mushrooms on its back absorb most of the nutrition.

name: Parasect
description: A host-parasite pair in which the parasite mushroom has taken over the host bug.

name: Venonat
description: Lives in the shadows of tall trees where it eats insects. It is attracted to light at night.

name: Venomoth
description: The dustlike scales covering its wings are color coded to indicate the toxicity of the poison it has.

name: Bellsprout
description: Even though its body is extremely skinny, it is blindingly fast when it moves to catch prey.

name: Weepinbell
description: It spits out Poisonpowder to immobilize the enemy and then finishes it with a spray of Acid.

name: Victreebel
description: Said to live in huge colonies deep in jungles, although no one has ever returned from there.

name: Slowpoke
description: Incredibly slow and dopey. It takes 5 seconds for it to feel pain when under attack.

name: Slowbro
description: The Shellder that is latched onto Slowpoke's tail is said to feed on the host's left over scraps.

name: Slowking
description: Every time it yawns, Shellder injects more poison into it. The poison makes it more intelligent.

name: Magnemite
description: Uses anti-gravity to stay suspended. Appears without warning and uses Thunder Wave and similar moves.

name: Magneton
description: Formed by several Magnemites linked together. They frequently appear when sunspots flare up.

name: Magnezone
description: It evolved from exposure to a special magnetic field. Three units generate magnetism.

name: Onix
description: As it grows, the stone portions of its body harden to become similar to a diamond, albeit black.

name: Steelix
description: It is thought its body transformed as a result of iron accumulating internally from swallowing soil.

name: Cubone
description: Because it never removes its skull helmet, no one has ever seen this Pokémon's real face.

name: Marowak
description: The bone it holds is its key weapon. It throws the bone skillfully like a boomerang to KO targets.

name: Tyrogue
description: Even though it is small, it can't be ignored because it will slug any handy target without warning.

name: Hitmonlee
description: When in a hurry, its legs lengthen progressively. It runs smoothly with extra long, loping strides.

name: Hitmonchan
description: While apparently doing nothing, it fires punches in lightning fast volleys that are impossible to see.

name: Hitmontop
description: It launches kicks while spinning. If it spins at high speed, it may bore its way into the ground.

name: Koffing
description: Because it stores several kinds of toxic gases in its body, it is prone to exploding without warning.

name: Weezing
description: Where two kinds of poison gases meet, two Koffing can fuse over many years into a Weezing.

name: Tangela
description: The whole body is swathed with wide vines that are similar to seaweed. Its vines shake as it walks.

name: Tangrowth
description: By entwining its ivy-like arms, it can entrap an enemy. It enhances the illusion that it is a plant.

name: Scyther
description: With ninja-like agility and speed, it can create the illusion that there is more than one.

name: Scizor
description: It has a body with the hardness of steel. It is not easily fazed by ordinary sorts of attacks.

name: Pinsir
description: It grips prey with its massive pincers and will not stop squeezing until the prey is torn in half.

name: Magikarp
description: In the distant past, it was somewhat stronger than the horribly weak descendants that exist today.

name: Gyarados
description: Once it begins to rampage, a Gyarados will burn everything down, even in a harsh storm.

name: Ditto
description: Capable of copying an enemy's genetic code to instantly transform itself into a duplicate of the enemy.

name: Hoothoot
description: It always stands on one foot. It changes feet so fast, the movement can rarely be seen.

name: Noctowl
description: When it needs to think, it rotates its head 180 degrees to sharpen its intellectual power.

name: Heracross
description: This powerful Pokémon thrusts its prized horn under its enemies' bellies then lifts and throws them.

name: Volbeat
description: It lights up its tail to communicate. It loves the sweet aroma given off by Illumise.

name: Illumise
description: It lures Volbeat with a sweet fragrance. It takes pride in the sweet scent it produces with its body.

name: Gulpin
description: Most of Gulpin's body is made up of its stomach. As a result, it can swallow something its own size.

name: Swalot
description: It has no teeth, so what it can't swallow whole, it drains the nutrients from by covering it in gooey poison.

name: Cacnea
description: It lives in arid locations. The flower on its head opens for only one night each year.

name: Cacturne
description: During the day, it remains unmoving so that it does not lose moisture to the harsh desert sun.

name: Combee
description: A gathering of three Combee. It is always collecting honey. At night, they cluster to sleep.

name: Vespiquen
description: It houses its colony in cells in its body and releases various pheromones to make those grubs do its bidding.

name: Shellos
description: Beware of pushing on its soft body, as it will discharge a strange sticky purple fluid.

name: Gastrodon
description: It lives in shallow tidal pools. It has an amazing ability to adapt to the sea even if its slimy body dries out.

name: Drifloon
description: A Pokémon formed by the spirits of people and Pokémon. It loves damp, humid seasons.

name: Drifblim
description: It's drowsy in daytime, but flies off in the evening. It can carry people, but it may just float away.

name: Drilbur
description: It can dig through the ground at a speed of 30 mph. It feeds on plant roots, using its claws to dig them up.

name: Excadrill
description: More than 300 feet below the surface, they build mazelike nests. Their activity can be destructive to buildings.

name: Timburr
description: It fights by swinging a wooden beam around. It is close to evolving when it can handle the weight easily.

name: Gurdurr
description: This Pokémon is so muscular and sturdy that even a group of wrestlers could not make it budge an inch.

name: Conkeldurr
description: It is thought that Conkeldurr taught humans how to make concrete more than 2,000 years ago.

name: Litwick
description: While shining a light and pretending to be a guide, it leeches off the life force of any who follow it.

name: Lampent
description: It lurks in cities in the form of a lamp. It feeds on the life force of those it calls to it.

name: Chandelure
description: Being consumed in Chandelure's flames burns up the spirit, leaving the body behind.

name: Axew
description: They use their tusks to crush the berries they eat. Repeated regrowth makes their tusks stronger and sharper.

name: Fraxure
description: Because their tusks break if they miss a blow, they take great care of them by polishing them on river stones.

name: Haxorus
description: Its tusks are incredibly hard and will stay sharp even if used to cut steel beams.

name: Goomy
description: It is the weakest Dragon-type Pokémon. Its mucousy body is hard to grab and reduces damage.

name: Sliggoo
description: Its four horns are a sensory organ for detecting smell. It steers itself by following scents.

name: Goodra
description: A very friendly Dragon Pokémon. It will hug its beloved Trainer, leaving them covered in sticky slime.

name: Cramorant
description: It's so strong that it can knock out some opponents in one hit, but it sometimes forgets what it was doing.

name: Pichu
description: Despite being small, it can zap even adult humans. However, it does so accidentally sometimes.

name: Pikachu
description: It occasionally uses an electric shock to recharge a fellow Pikachu that is in a weakened state.

name: Raichu
description: Its long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high-voltage power.

name: Zubat
description: Forms colonies in perpetually dark places. Uses ultrasonic waves to identify and approach targets.

name: Golbat
description: Once it strikes, it will not stop draining energy from the victim even if it gets too heavy to fly.

name: Crobat
description: The addition of a second pair of wings makes it more aerodynamic and grants it speed greater than a jet plane.

name: Meowth
description: It is attracted by glittery things. At night, it seeks out shiny things for the gold coin on its head.

name: Persian
description: The gem in its forehead glows on its own! It walks with all the grace and elegance of a proud Pokémon.

name: Psyduck
description: While lulling its enemies with its vacant look, this wily Pokémon will use psychokinetic powers.

name: Golduck
description: Often seen swimming elegantly by lake shores. It is often mistaken for the Japanese monster, Kappa.

name: Growlithe
description: Very protective of its territory. It will bark and bite to repel intruders from its space.

name: Arcanine
description: A Pokémon that has long been admired for its beauty. It runs agilely as if on wings.

name: Farfetch'd
description: The leek it holds is its weapon and food. Protecting it with its life, it will not hand over its leek to anyone.

name: Grimer
description: Appears in filthy areas. Thrives by sucking up polluted sludge that is pumped out of factories.

name: Muk
description: Thickly covered with a filthy, vile sludge. It is so toxic, even its footprints contain poison.

name: Gastly
description: Almost invisible, this gaseous Pokémon cloaks the target and puts it to sleep without the target knowing.

name: Haunter
description: Because of its ability to slip through block walls, it is said to be from another dimension.

name: Gengar
description: Under a full moon, this Pokémon likes to mimic the shadows of people and laugh at their fright.

name: Voltorb
description: Usually found in power plants. Easily mistaken for a Poké Ball, it has zapped many people.

name: Electrode
description: It stores electric energy under very high pressure. It often explodes with little or no provocation.

name: Exeggcute
description: Often mistaken for eggs, they move together because they are linked via telepathy.

name: Exeggutor
description: Legend has it that on rare occasions, one of its heads will drop off and continue on as an Exeggcute.

name: Happiny
description: It carefully carries a round, white rock in its belly pouch and gives the rock to its favorite people.

name: Chansey
description: A kindhearted Pokémon that shares its nutritious eggs if it sees an injured Pokémon.

name: Blissey
description: Anyone who takes even one bite of Blissey's egg becomes filled with a pleasant, mild happiness.

name: Elekid
description: Elekid stores electricity in its body. If it touches metal when charged up, it discharges sparks.

name: Electabuzz
description: Electricity runs across the surface of its body. Those who touch it receive a powerful jolt.

name: Electivire
description: It pushes the tips of its two tails against the foe, then lets loose with over 20,000 volts of power.

name: Lapras
description: A Pokémon that has been overhunted almost to extinction. It can ferry people across the water.

name: Munchlax
description: It wolfs down its weight in food once a day. It swallows food whole with almost no chewing.

name: Snorlax
description: Its stomach's digestive juices can dissolve any kind of poison. It can even eat things off the ground.

name: Spinarak
description: Its web is almost invisible. Touching it carelessly will result in getting tangled up in it.

name: Ariados
description: It spins string not only from its rear but also its mouth. It attaches silk to its prey and sets it free, then tracks it.

name: Mareep
description: Its fluffy coat swells to double when static electricity builds up. Touching it will shock you.

name: Flaaffy
description: Flaaffy's wool quality changed to store more electricity. The bare, rubbery patches on its skin prevent electricity discharge.

name: Ampharos
description: The tail's tip shines brightly and can be seen even from space. Sailors use it for navigating at sea.

name: Azurill
description: Azurill's tail bounces it around. The tail is large and bouncy, and Azurill can be seen bouncing on it to get around.

name: Marill
description: It can swim in raging mountain streams. It wraps its tail around a tree or a rock to keep itself from being washed away.

name: Azumarill
description: Its elongated ears are superb sensors. It can pick up sounds from far away while it is underwater.

name: Wooper
description: It walks in shallow waters. When walking on land, it coats its body with a slimy film to prevent dehydration.

name: Paldean Wooper
description: Paldean Wooper once lived underwater, but when it lost its habitat, it began to live in bogs and wetlands.

name: Clodsire
description: A carefree Pokémon. Using its slow movement, it herds enemies towards the poisonous quills on its body.

name: Smeargle
description: Once it becomes an adult, it has a compulsion to mark its territory using a painter's mark.

name: Torchic
description: It has a place inside its body where it keeps a flame. Give it a hug—it will be as warm as a hot water bottle.

name: Combusken
description: It hardens its legs by running through fields of tall grass. It can deliver 10 kicks per second.

name: Blaziken
description: In battle, Blaziken blows out intense flames from its wrists and attacks the foe courageously.

name: Wingull
description: It carries food and belongings in its bill. It soars on updrafts at the seaside without flapping its wings.

name: Pelipper
description: A messenger of the skies. It carries small Pokémon and eggs in its bill to safety across the sea.

name: Makuhita
description: It loves to train. It never gives up when it gets beaten—it bounces back up every time with more and more power.

name: Hariyama
description: It likes to take a contest of strength by challenging others to test of strength. It boasts power rivaling large trucks.

name: Absol
description: Every time Absol appears before people, it is followed by a disaster such as an earthquake or a tidal wave.

name: Piplup
description: Because it is very proud, it hates accepting food from people. Its thick down guards it from cold.

name: Prinplup
description: It lives alone, away from others. Apparently, every one of them believes it is the most important.

name: Empoleon
description: The three horns that extend from its beak attest to its power. The leader has the biggest horns.

name: Audino
description: It has a very compassionate nature. It places its twitching ears on the chests of people to hear their heartbeats.

name: Trubbish
description: The combination of garbage bags and industrial waste caused a chemical reaction that created this Pokémon.

name: Garbodor
description: It clenches opponents with its left arm and finishes them off with foul-smelling poison gas belched from its right hand.

name: Zorua
description: To protect themselves from danger, they hide their true form and transform into people and Pokémon.

name: Zoroark
description: Bonds between these Pokémon are very strong. It protects the safety of its pack by tricking its opponents.

name: Minccino
description: These Pokémon prefer a tidy habitat. They are always sweeping and dusting, using their tails as brooms.

name: Cinccino
description: Their white fur feels amazing to touch. The special oils coating the fur make it repel any dirt or dust.

name: Grubbin
description: Grubbin relies on its sturdy jaw as a weapon in battles and as a tool for burrowing through the earth.

name: Charjabug
description: Inside Charjabug's body is an organ that generates electrical energy. Some people even use them as portable chargers.

name: Vikavolt
description: It zips around, steering with its hips. It has an electric launcher in its jaws and can focus electricity into a powerful beam.

name: Mimikyu
description: A lonely Pokémon, it conceals its terrifying appearance beneath an old rag so it can get closer to people and other Pokémon.

name: Pawmi
description: In addition to the electric sacs in its cheeks, it also has organs that generate electricity on its forepaws.

name: Pawmo
description: This Pokémon discharges electricity from its forepaws. It's very agile—it runs across the ground on all fours.

name: Pawmot
description: This Pokémon discharges powerful electricity from its forepaws. Its fluffy coat can store electricity.

name: Tatsugiri
description: The curl in its tail is used to communicate to others of its kind. Different colored forms have been identified.

name: Ekans
description: Moves silently and stealthily. Eats the eggs of birds, such as Spearow, whole.

name: Arbok
description: It is rumored that the ferocious warning markings on its belly differ from area to area.

name: Cleffa
description: Cleffa are often seen in meteor showers. They are born from the shooting stars that fall from the heavens.

name: Clefairy
description: Fairy-like in appearance, its magical and cute appeal has many admirers. It is rare in the wild.

name: Clefable
description: A timid fairy Pokémon that is rarely seen. It will run and hide the moment it senses people.

name: Igglybuff
description: Very sensitive to sounds. It doesn't sleep very deeply. It is always humming and can't seem to help itself.

name: Jigglypuff
description: When its huge eyes waver, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep.

name: Wigglytuff
description: The body is soft and rubbery. When angered, it will suck in air and inflate itself to an enormous size.

name: Diglett
description: A Pokémon that lives underground. When it pops its head up, it leaves the soil perfectly tilled for planting.

name: Dugtrio
description: A team of three Diglett triplets. It triggers huge earthquakes by burrowing 60 miles underground.

name: Machop
description: It trains by lifting Graveler. It can even do 100 reps without breaking a sweat.

name: Machoke
description: Its muscular body is so powerful, it must wear a power-save belt to be able to regulate its motions.

name: Machamp
description: Using its four powerful arms, it can knock you out with 1000 karate chops in two seconds.

name: Geodude
description: Found in fields and mountains. Mistaking them for boulders, people often step on them or sit on them.

name: Graveler
description: Rolls down slopes to move. It rolls over any obstacle without slowing or changing its direction.

name: Golem
description: Its boulder-like body is extremely hard. It can easily withstand dynamite blasts without taking damage.

name: Magby
description: A belch of flame is its greetings. When it inhales, its flame sac expands and sways with its body.

name: Magmar
description: Its body always burns with an orange glow that enables it to hide perfectly among flames.

name: Magmortar
description: It blasts fireballs of over 3,600 degrees Fahrenheit out of its arms. Its prey are burnt to a crisp.

name: Bonsly
description: It's very skilled at enduring thirst. The liquid secreted from its eyes is not tears but a salty liquid that it extracts from its body.

name: Sudowoodo
description: In order to avoid being attacked, it does nothing but mimic a tree. Despite its appearance, it hates water.

name: Murkrow
description: Feared and loathed by many, it is believed to bring misfortune to all those who see it at night.

name: Honchkrow
description: Becoming active at night, it is known to call out Murkrow using its loud cry. It is the boss Pokémon.

name: Larvitar
description: Born deep underground, it feeds on soil. Once it has eaten a large mountain, it will fall asleep so it can evolve.

name: Pupitar
description: Hard and fast in its shell. Even a rock-crushing ram won't make it flinch. What an evolved creature!

name: Tyranitar
description: In just one of its mighty hands, it has the power to make the ground shake and mountains crumble.

name: Lotad
description: It is said to have dwelled on land before. However, it returned to the water because it could not keep its leaf wet.

name: Lombre
description: Lombre is nocturnal—it will be active from sundown to sunrise. It lives at the water's edge.

name: Ludicolo
description: Upon hearing festive music, all the cells in its body become stimulated. It becomes full of energy and starts moving.

name: Mawile
description: Mawile's huge jaws are actually steel horns that have been transformed. Its docile-looking face serves to lull its prey.

name: Torkoal
description: It burns coal inside its shell for energy. When coal runs out, it becomes unable to move.

name: Kricketot
description: When the temperature drops, they will often huddle together for warmth. Their antennae chime with each step.

name: Kricketune
description: It crosses its knifelike arms in front of its chest when it cries. The sound is like a lullaby and captivates people.

name: Chatot
description: It can mimic the voices of people and Pokémon. It can even understand what it's saying if it happens to be there.

name: Riolu
description: It uses the shapes of auras, which change according to emotion, to communicate with others of its kind.

name: Lucario
description: It reads the auras of all things. It can even imbue harmless-looking waves with its aura.

name: Rotom
description: Its body is composed of plasma. It is known to infiltrate electronic devices and wreak havoc.

name: Larvesta
description: The base of volcanoes is where they make their homes. They shoot fire from their five horns to repel enemies.

name: Volcarona
description: When volcanic ash darkened the atmosphere, it is said that Volcarona's fire provided a replacement for the sun.

name: Rowlet
description: It gathers energy through photosynthesis during the day and acts at night. Silently it glides, drawing near its target.

name: Dartrix
description: This narcissistic Pokémon is obsessed with its looks and hates it when its feathers get ruffled.

name: Decidueye
description: It nocks a quill arrow with the leaf on its wrist and shoots it with a flick of its wing.

name: Scorbunny
description: A warm fire energy coursing through its body is the source of its never-ending vitality.

name: Raboot
description: Its thick and fluffy fur protects it from the cold and enables it to use hotter fire moves.

name: Cinderace
description: It juggles a pebble with its feet, turning it into a burning soccer ball. Its shots ignite.

name: Skwovet
description: Found throughout the Galar region, this Pokémon becomes anxious if its cheeks are ever empty of berries.

name: Greedent
description: It stashes berries in its tail. Berries fall out of its overstuffed tail as it wanders around.

name: Rolycoly
description: It can race down mountainsides using its single red eye for balance. The eye is also used to find coal.

name: Carkol
description: It forms coal inside its body. Towns that have running out of fuel sometimes ask Carkol for help.

name: Coalossal
description: It's usually peaceful, but the coal ash puffing out of it can set the surrounding area ablaze.

name: Toxel
description: It stores poison in an internal poison sac and secretes that poison through its skin.

name: Toxtricity
description: When it smacks its chest, toxic electricity generates sparks that can shock opponents.

name: Fidough
description: This Pokémon's moist, smooth skin has elastic qualities and is uncommonly good at repelling attacks.

name: Dachsbun
description: This Pokémon has a pleasing aroma. Dachsbun's well-baked body has a pleasant aroma that wafts through the air.

name: Charcadet
description: It burns with such intensity that it melts the armor of enemy Pokémon. Its flame has been burning since it was born.

name: Armarouge
description: Using the power from its core, it converts its whole body into a weapon to take down foes.

name: Ceruledge
description: Old grudges made manifest, Ceruledge lays waste to everything around itself with blades of fire and ghost energy.

name: Glimmet
description: It clings to cave ceilings, and when prey comes along, it drops down to attack. Its crystal spines hold its poison.

name: Glimmora
description: It unconsciously uses its petal-like scales when it is in danger. It ejects toxic spores to protect itself.

name: Gimmighoul
description: It hides in treasure chests and tricks humans into collecting coins. The number of coins it has collected so far is unknown.

name: Gholdengo
description: It is said that Gholdengo's body is made of 1000 coins. It loves Gimmighoul coins and will do anything to get them.

name: Vulpix
description: At birth, it has but one tail. The tail splits from its tip as it grows older.

name: Ninetales
description: Very smart and very vengeful. Grabbing one of its many tails could result in a 1,000-year curse.

name: Poliwag
description: The direction of the swirl on its belly differs by area. The equator is home to swirls that spin in both directions.

name: Poliwhirl
description: Capable of living in or out of water. When out of water, it sweats to keep its body slimy.

name: Poliwrath
description: An adept swimmer at both the front crawl and breaststroke. Easily overtakes the best human swimmers.

name: Politoed
description: The curled hair on its head is proof of its status as a king. It is said that all Poliwag convene when it sings.

name: Abra
description: If it senses danger, it teleports to safety. It can read minds and predict moves before they happen.

name: Kadabra
description: It emits special alpha waves from its body that induce headaches in people nearby.

name: Alakazam
description: Its brain can outperform a supercomputer. Its intelligence quotient is said to be 5,000.

name: Mime Jr.
description: It habitually mimics anyone it sees. Once it starts mimicking, it can't stop until the other person leaves.

name: Mr. Mime
description: It is a master at pantomime. It can convince watchers that something unseeable actually exists.

name: Porygon
description: A Pokémon that consists entirely of programming code. Capable of moving freely in cyberspace.

name: Porygon2
description: Further research enhanced its abilities. Sometimes it behaves strangely, as if it had emotions.

name: Porygon-Z
description: Additional programming was added to make it a more well-rounded Pokémon, but it began acting oddly as a result.

name: Dratini
description: Long thought to be a myth, this Pokémon was finally confirmed to exist when a fisherman caught one.

name: Dragonair
description: A mystical Pokémon that exudes a gentle aura. Has the ability to change climate conditions.

name: Dragonite
description: A marine Pokémon, its intelligence is said to match that of humans. It guides ships through storms.

name: Cyndaquil
description: It is timid and always curls itself up in a ball. If attacked, it flares up its back for protection.

name: Quilava
description: It is fully covered by its flames, so even the most ferocious opponents cannot lay a finger on it.

name: Typhlosion
description: It obscures itself behind a shimmering heat haze that it creates using its intensely hot flames.

name: Misdreavus
description: It likes to bite and yank people's hair from behind, then vanish into the dark before being spotted.

name: Mismagius
description: Its cries sound like incantations. Those hearing it are tormented by headaches and hallucinations.

name: Girafarig
description: Its tail has a small brain of its own. Beware! If you get close, it may bite with the tail's sharp fangs.

name: Farigiraf
description: Its two brains are linked, which gives it superior intuition. It can even figure out a foe's next move.

name: Ralts
description: It is highly attuned to the emotions of people and Pokémon. If joy wells up around it, it feels happy.

name: Kirlia
description: It is said that a Kirlia that is exposed to the positive emotions of its Trainer grows beautiful.

name: Gardevoir
description: It will give its life to protect its Trainer. It will never fail to protect its Trainer from danger.

name: Gallade
description: Because it can sense what its foe is thinking, it can cut them off before they make their move.

name: Plusle
description: Plusle always acts as a cheerleader for its partner Pokémon. When its partner is in trouble, it calls out for help.

name: Minun
description: Minun is more concerned about cheering on its partners than it is about its own safety. It shorts out the electricity in its body to send off sparks of approval.

name: Trapinch
description: Its nest is a sloped, bowl-shaped pit in the desert. Once a prey stumbles in, it can't get back out.

name: Vibrava
description: To make prey dizzy, it generates ultrasonic waves by rubbing its two wings together.

name: Flygon
description: Flygon whips up a sandstorm by flapping its wings. The sandstorm obscures its form while it attacks.

name: Swablu
description: It has a habit of polishing shiny things. It cleans its cotton-ball wings and makes them fluffy.

name: Altaria
description: It flies gracefully among the clouds and sings in a gorgeous soprano. Its dreamy appearance draws many admirers.

name: Duskull
description: It is said to be a nocturnal Pokémon. It haunts lonely places in the dark of the night.

name: Dusclops
description: Its body is completely hollow. Staring into its single eye supposedly creates a feeling of being pulled inside.

name: Dusknoir
description: Its antenna catches signals from the spirit world. It uses those signals to bring people where spirits are waiting.

name: Beldum
description: Instead of blood, a powerful magnetic force courses through its body. Using this force, it can fly.

name: Metang
description: When two Beldum fuse together, Metang is formed. The brains of the two Beldum are linked by a magnetic force.

name: Metagross
description: Metagross has four brains in total. Combined, the four brains can perform any calculation in an instant.

name: Snivy
description: It is very intelligent and calm. Being exposed to lots of sunlight makes its movements more swift.

name: Servine
description: It moves along the ground as if sliding. Its swift movements befuddle its foes, and it then attacks with ivy.

name: Serperior
description: It can stop its opponents' movements with just a glare. It takes in solar energy and boosts it internally.

name: Froakie
description: It secretes flexible bubbles from its chest and back. The bubbles reduce the damage it would otherwise take.

name: Frogadier
description: It can throw bubble-covered pebbles with precise aim at distances of up to 100 feet.

name: Greninja
description: It creates throwing stars out of compressed water. When it spins them and throws them at high speed, its stars can split metal.

name: Dedenne
description: Using its whiskers as antennas, it sends and receives electricity with others of its kind.

name: Noibat
description: Even large prey such as Stantler are paralyzed by its ultrasonic waves, so it can catch them with ease.

name: Noivern
description: The ultrasonic waves it emits from its ears can reduce a large boulder to rubble. It flies through the dark of night.

name: Rookidee
description: It will bravely challenge any opponent no matter how mighty. This Pokémon benefits from every battle, even a defeat.

name: Corvisquire
description: Smart enough to use tools in battle, this Pokémon has enough skill to take down opponents bigger than itself.

name: Corviknight
description: This Pokémon reigns supreme in the skies of the Galar region. The black luster of its wings is a sign of its power.

name: Dreepy
description: If this weak Pokémon is by itself, a mere child could defeat it. But it has tremendous potential.

name: Drakloak
description: It's capable of flying faster than 120 mph. It battles alongside Dreepy and dotes on them.

name: Dragapult
description: When it isn't battling, it keeps Dreepy in the hollows of its horns. When the battle heats up, it launches the Dreepy like supersonic missiles.

name: Sprigatito
description: Its fluffy fur is similar in composition to plants. This Pokémon frequently washes its face to keep it from drying out.

name: Floragato
description: It skillfully controls the vine hidden beneath its long fur. The bud on this vine is full of nutrients.

name: Meowscarada
description: With the agility of a magician, it distracts opponents and slips sharp flower pieces through their defenses.

name: Wattrel
description: By riding the winds and bathing in lightning, it generates electricity. Its electric organ is in its hollow bones.

name: Kilowattrel
description: It puffs up its throat sac to amplify its electricity, then uses it to create a powerful electrified aura.

name: Tinkatink
description: This Pokémon uses its own unique hammer to smash the hammers of Tinkatuff. It collects the pieces to craft new hammers.

name: Tinkatuff
description: This Pokémon raids the nests of Corviknight. The hammers of Tinkatuff are made of sturdy materials.

name: Tinkaton
description: It is an extremely cunning Pokémon. It knocks rocks and debris into the sky with its 220-pound hammer, aiming to strike Corviknight.

name: Aerodactyl
description: A ferocious, prehistoric Pokémon that goes for the enemy's throat with its serrated saw-like fangs.

name: Cranidos
description: A Pokemon that lived in jungles around 100 million years ago. Its head is as hard as iron.

name: Rampardos
description: Its powerful head butt has enough force to shatter even the most durable things upon impact.

name: Shieldon
description: Its face, covered in iron armor, is the main source of defense. Its rear is unprotected.

name: Bastiodon
description: Any frontal attack is repulsed. It is a docile Pokémon that feeds on grass and berries.

name: Tyrunt
description: It's spoiled and selfish. It bites apart anything and everything it dislikes.

name: Tyrantrum
description: Thanks to its gargantuan jaws, which could shred thick steel plates, it was invincible in the ancient world it once was king of.

name: Amaura
description: This calm Pokémon was restored from a fossil. It creates a wall of ice in battle.

name: Aurorus
description: It can instantly create a wall of ice to use as a shield. It can also freeze opponents solid with the crystals on its body.

name: Eevee
description: Its genetic code is irregular. It may mutate if exposed to radiation from element Stones.

name: Vaporeon
description: It lives close to water. Its long tail is ridged with a fin which is often mistaken for a mermaid's.

name: Jolteon
description: It accumulates negative ions in the atmosphere to blast out 10,000-volt lightning bolts.

name: Flareon
description: Inhaled air is carried to the flame sac, heated to upward of 3,000 degrees, and blown back out as fire.

name: Espeon
description: It uses the fine hair that covers its body to sense air currents and predict its enemy's actions.

name: Umbreon
description: When exposed to the moon's aura, the rings on its body glow faintly and it gains a mysterious power.

name: Leafeon
description: When you see Leafeon asleep in a patch of sunshine, you'll know it is using photosynthesis to produce clean air.

name: Glaceon
description: It can instantly freeze moisture in the atmosphere. It sprays a blizzard of ice to freeze its prey solid.

name: Sylveon
description: It wraps its ribbonlike feelers around its Trainer's arm and walks with its Trainer. The feelers emit a soothing aura.

name: Raikou
description: The rain clouds it carries let it fire thunderbolts at will. It races across the land while barking in a sharp voice.

name: Entei
description: Volcanoes erupt when it barks. Unable to restrain its extreme power, it races headlong around the land.

name: Suicune
description: It races across the land. It is said that north winds will somehow blow whenever it appears.

name: Articuno
description: A legendary bird Pokémon that can control ice. The flapping of its wings chills the air. As a result, snow falls wherever it flies.

name: Zapdos
description: A legendary bird Pokémon that is said to appear from clouds while dropping lightning bolts.

name: Moltres
description: Known as the legendary bird of fire. Every flap of its wings creates a dazzling flash of flames.

name: Lugia
description: It is said to be the guardian of the seas. It is rumored to have been seen on the night of a storm.

name: Ho-Oh
description: Its feathers glow in seven colors depending on the angle at which they are struck by light. These feathers are said to bring happiness to the bearer.

name: Volcanion
description: It lets out billows of steam and forces its way through mountains. The power of its steam is so great, it can blow away a mountain.

name: Kyogre
description: It is said to have expanded the seas by causing downpours. It has the ability to move the sea.

name: Mewtwo
description: It was created by a scientist after years of horrific gene splicing and DNA engineering experiments.

name: Mew
description: So rare that it is still said to be a mirage by many experts. Only a few people have seen it worldwide.

name: Houndour
description: It uses different kinds of cries for communicating with others of its kind and for pursuing its prey.

name: Houndoom
description: Long ago, people were terrified by the fire it spewed. Any Pokémon that was burned by its flames was said to be cursed.

name: Snubbull
description: Many women like it because of its cute face. It is timid despite its looks and is easily frightened.

name: Granbull
description: Although it may seem intimidating, it is actually timid and uses its large fangs to keep threats at bay.

name: Phanpy
description: It makes its nest by digging in the ground with its long nose. It snuggles up with its friends to sleep.
